creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The "X11" option enables use of libX11 and allows Vim to be X11 aware. 
This is how Vim changes the Xterm's window title bar to "VIM: <filename>". 

"X11" does not give one a GUI -- ATHENA is the basic X11 Widgets you 
were probably looking for.
